query: Magnificent 7 tech companies (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla) large acquisitions $10 billion or more announced or rumored in 2026, especially mid-2026. Any pending big M&A deals as of June-July 2026?
answer:
I've completed comprehensive research on Magnificent 7 large M&A activity in 2026. Here's the summary:

## Key Findings

**Confirmed $10B+ deals involving the Magnificent 7 in 2026:**

1. **Alphabet (Google) → Wiz — ~$32B** (LARGEST): Google's biggest-ever acquisition. Closed March 11, 2026 after EU unconditional approval (Feb 10, 2026).

2. **Microsoft/Nvidia-led consortium → Aligned Data Centers — ~$40B**: Announced Oct 2025, closing H1 2026. A consortium deal (with BlackRock GIP, MGX, AIP) rather than a single-company acquisition — largest-ever digital infrastructure deal.

3. **Amazon → Globalstar — ~$11.6B**: Announced April 14, 2026, to boost its Leo satellite internet business.

**On mid-2026 (June–July) pending/rumored deals — the core of your question:**
- **No new $10B+ single-company Mag 7 acquisition** was announced or credibly rumored in June–July 2026.
- The biggest mid-2026 tech M&A headline was **SpaceX's ~$60B Cursor/Anysphere deal (June 16)** — but SpaceX is *not* a Magnificent 7 company.
- Elon Musk floated a **speculative Tesla–SpaceX merger** (late May/June), but no formal deal.

**Sub-$10B deals (context):** Apple-Q.ai (~$2B), Meta-Manus (~$2B, blocked by China), Tesla-unnamed AI hardware (~$2B), and Nvidia-Groq (~$20B, but structured as a licensing/acqui-hire, not an acquisition).

The dominant 2026 Big Tech theme was **AI capex (~$650–725B combined)** and data-center commitments rather than outright M&A. Full structured findings with all sources and data points have been submitted.

sources.title: Google wraps up $32B acquisition of cloud cybersecurity startup Wiz
sources.snippet: Google officially acquired Israeli cybersecurity firm Wiz for $32 billion in cash, a full year after the companies announced the deal. This marks Google's biggest acquisition in its history.

sources.title: Wiz, Inc. - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: On 11 March 2026, Alphabet Inc. acquired Wiz in a $32 billion deal.

sources.title: Alphabet Secures Unconditional EU Approval for Landmark $32 Billion Wiz Acquisition
sources.snippet: Alphabet received unconditional antitrust clearance from the EU for its $32 billion acquisition of Wiz, finalized Feb 10, 2026.

sources.title: Amazon to buy Globalstar to bolster Leo satellite business in deal worth about $11.6 billion
sources.snippet: Amazon said Tuesday it would acquire Globalstar for $90 a share, in a deal worth about $11.57 billion.

sources.title: Aligned Data Centers sold to BlackRock and MGX in record-breaking $40bn deal
sources.snippet: Aligned Data Centers is being sold to a group comprising AIP, MGX, and BlackRock-owned GIP for $40 billion; deal expected to close in H1 2026.

sources.title: Nvidia, Microsoft, and BlackRock Lead $40 Billion Takeover of Aligned Data Centers
sources.snippet: A global consortium including Nvidia, Microsoft, BlackRock, and Elon Musk's xAI reached an agreement to acquire Aligned Data Centers for $40 billion.

sources.title: Biggest Tech Acquisitions Of 2026
sources.snippet: Lists the largest 2026 deals: Aligned Data Centers ~$40B, Google-Wiz ~$32B, Palo Alto-CyberArk ~$25B; notes no confirmed $10B+ deals from Amazon, Apple, Meta, or Tesla (in that article).

sources.title: SpaceX to acquire the AI coding startup Cursor for $60 billion
sources.snippet: SpaceX announced it entered a formal agreement to buy AI startup Cursor (Anysphere) in a $60 billion deal.

sources.title: Nvidia Consolidates AI Supremacy with $20 Billion Groq Licensing Deal Ahead of CES 2026
sources.snippet: Nvidia announced a $20 billion licensing agreement and acqui-hire of AI chip firm Groq on Dec 24, 2025.

sources.title: Warren, Blumenthal Question Whether NVIDIA's $20 Billion Groq Deal is Attempt to Avoid Antitrust Laws
sources.snippet: Senators questioned whether Nvidia's $20B Groq deal was structured to avoid antitrust laws.

sources.title: Apple Made Its Second-Biggest Acquisition Ever This Year
sources.snippet: Apple acquired Israeli startup Q.ai for close to $2 billion, its second-biggest acquisition ever after Beats ($3B, 2014).

sources.title: China blocks Meta's $2 billion takeover of AI startup Manus
sources.snippet: China's NDRC called for Meta to unwind its $2 billion acquisition of Manus on April 27, 2026.

sources.title: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
sources.snippet: Meta acquired humanoid robotics startup Assured Robot Intelligence (ARI) for an undisclosed sum.

sources.title: Tesla quietly discloses $2 billion AI hardware company acquisition buried in filing
sources.snippet: Tesla agreed to acquire an unnamed AI hardware company for up to $2 billion in stock and equity awards, per its Q1 2026 10-Q.

sources.title: Tesla and SpaceX merger would be Musk's 4th billion-dollar self-deal
sources.snippet: Elon Musk is reportedly floating the idea of merging Tesla and SpaceX ahead of SpaceX's IPO.

sources.title: Skyrocketing component prices push Big Tech capex to record $725 billion
sources.snippet: Google, Amazon, Microsoft, and Meta plan to spend a combined $725 billion on capex in 2026, a 77% increase over 2025's $410 billion.

sources.title: What Amazon's Globalstar Acquisition Means for MSS Spectrum and D2D Market
sources.snippet: Amazon moved to acquire Globalstar in a deal worth roughly $10.8 billion, including a tie-in with Apple.

data_points.metric: Microsoft/Nvidia-led consortium acquisition of Aligned Data Centers
Nvidia-Groq licensing/acqui-hire deal (sub-threshold, not traditional acquisition)
Meta acquisition of Manus (blocked/unwound by China, below threshold)
Tesla acquisition of unnamed AI hardware company (below threshold)
